hooks.command: SKILL=$(jq -r '.tool_input.skill // .tool_input.args' 2>/dev/null); if [ "$SKILL" = "commit-commands:commit" ] || [ "$SKILL" = "commit-commands:commit-push-pr" ]; then cd /Users/arend/Developer/flemish-network && npm run lint 2>&1 && npm run typecheck 2>&1; else exit 0; fi

[ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true
